identity.mission: Create a calming, supportive, and professional digital sanctuary for parents in crisis.
principles: Clarity is Kindness: Information must be digestible, not overwhelming.
Soft Utility: Functional design that feels like a warm hug, not a cold form.
Nature as Anchor: Use organic shapes and breathing room to reduce anxiety.
Pathways, Not Walls: Visuals should suggest movement forward and navigation.

headings.usage: Main section headers. Use tight tracking (-0.02em) for a modern feel. If Manrope is unavailable, use the existing Cormorant Garamond for a more classic, serious tone, but ensure it is Bold.

body.usage: All paragraph text. High legibility is critical.

special.usage: Pull quotes, 'First 48 Hours' emphasis, and testimonials.

hero.description: Text on the left (60%), Image with organic mask/blob shape on the right (40%). Avoid standard rectangles.
hero.motion: Fade up text, slow drift for image.

bento_grid.style: Cards should have soft shadows (shadow-lg shadow-purple-900/5) and rounded-2xl corners.

process_steps.style: Vertical timeline with connecting lines. Use the Primary Purple for the line and active step.

buttons.primary: bg-[#7C6A96] text-white hover:bg-[#6A5A82] rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-transform hover:scale-105 shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#7C6A96] border-2 border-[#7C6A96] hover:bg-[#F9F8FF] rounded-full px-8 py-3

cards.default: bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-sm border border-purple-100/50 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-lg rounded-2xl

navigation.style: Sticky glassmorphism header. Links should have a sliding underline effect on hover.

forms.input: bg-white border-purple-200 focus:border-[#7C6A96] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#7C6A96]/20 rounded-xl p-4 transition-all
forms.label: text-sm font-bold text-[#7C6A96] mb-2 block

visual_enhancers.texture: Add a subtle 'noise' overlay (opacity 0.03) to the entire body to reduce digital sterility.
visual_enhancers.blobs: Use large, blurred, colorful orbs (Purple/Lilac) in the background behind glass cards.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React icons. Use stroke-width={1.5} for a lighter, elegant look.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on purple backgrounds is white. All text on white backgrounds is dark slate.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus ring using the accent color (#B5A1D1).

hero.alt: Sunlight streaming through trees on a peaceful path
hero.usage: Hero background with overlay or side image

about.alt: Supportive family moment on a bench
about.usage: About section or Who We Support

support.alt: Mother and child sharing a quiet moment

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPLEMENTATION: Use 'App.tsx' as the main entry point. Create a components folder if not present.
2. THEME: Update 'index.css' to include the new font families (Manrope/DM Sans) via Google Fonts import.
3. NAVIGATION: Create a sticky header that changes background on scroll (transparent to glass).
4. SECTIONS: Build sections as separate components: Hero, About, WhoWeSupport, Services, Process, First48Hours, Resources, Contact.
5. CHATBOT: Implement the floating AI Chat button at the bottom right with a pulsing effect.
6. ANIMATION: Use framer-motion for all scroll reveals. Do not use static blocks.
7. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all buttons, inputs, and major sections.
8. GLASSMORPHISM: Apply the .glass-card utility to the 'First 48 Hours' guide to make it stand out as a critical resource.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Respect the purple constraints but use white space generously.
